register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Create an account to save your trip history
register.errorPassword: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Log in to save your history and favorite places

landing.subtitle: Explore the world through vivid audio stories that unfold with every step you take.

onboarding.slide1Desc: Discover Vinh Khanh Food Street with a smart guide right on your phone.
onboarding.slide2Desc: When you walk past a location, the app will automatically play audio narration. No action needed!
onboarding.slide3Desc: If GPS is inaccurate, you can scan a QR code at each location to hear the narration instantly.

tours.title: Explore Tours
tours.notFound: Tour not found or has no stops.

tourFollow.congratulations: Congratulations! You've finished the entire route.

more.title: Profile
more.loginDesc: Save your favorites and experience history
more.syncSuccess: Synced {{count}} locations. You can now scan QR offline!
more.syncFail: Unable to sync data. Check your connection and try again.

poi.noAudio: No audio guide available for this language.
poi.loginToFavorite: Please log in to add favorites
poi.audioError: Unable to play audio. Please try again later.

favorites.title: Favorite Places
favorites.empty: You don't have any favorite places yet.

scanner.instruction: Scan QR code at the attraction
scanner.largeDataMsg: This location has high-quality audio/video content. A network connection is needed for the best experience.
scanner.invalidQr: Invalid QR code or not part of the system
scanner.invalidQrNetwork: Invalid QR code or unable to connect to server!

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to track your history and favorite places
login.errorEmpty: Please enter both email and password.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: To fully experience all features of GPS Tours
register.errorPassword: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase letter and 1 number.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.registerSuccess: Account created successfully! You can now log in.
register.registerFailed: Registration failed. Email may already exist.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your registered email and we'll send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.emailSentDesc: If an account with this email exists, you will receive a password reset link in a few minutes.

about.introText: GPS Tours is a smart tourism narration app that automatically plays audio guides when you approach attractions at Vinh Khanh Food Street, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City.
about.feature1: Interactive map with points of interest
about.copyrightText:
© 2026 GPS Tours Team
Seminar Project — University

deviceCheck.title: Device Check
deviceCheck.subtitle: The app needs GPS and Internet to work properly

languageScreen.title: Choose Language
languageScreen.subtitle: Display language for POI content and audio narration
languageScreen.note: Note: Some POIs may not have content in your chosen language. Vietnamese content will be displayed instead.
